query: SELECT id, title, slug, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(questions, '$[0].type'), 50) as q0_type, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(questions, '$[0].title'), 80) as q0_title, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(questions, '$[1].type'), 50) as q1_type, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(questions, '$[1].title'), 80) as q1_title FROM forms ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2FrvTurB9J6YsbF.19ef00e26ab3 --database bDyKxbJirDkukZmvFFZQ8p --execute SELECT id, title, slug, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(questions, '$[0].type'), 50) as q0_type, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(questions, '$[0].title'), 80) as q0_title, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(questions, '$[1].type'), 50) as q1_type, LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(questions, '$[1].title'), 80) as q1_title FROM forms ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
